response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided lyrics for 'Utauyo!! MIRACLE'. 2. JSON Usage: Provided lyrics used for the performance segment; the talk segment at the end was manually transcribed as it was in English. 3. Timing & Pacing: Aggressive truncation used to keep up with the fast-paced song. Talk segment timed to distinct vocal phrases.

subtitles.original: みんなが大好きっ!!
subtitles.english: Everyone's favorite...!!

subtitles.original: 延々続行ルララ Miracle Sing Time
subtitles.english: It's our never-ending lu-la-la Miracle Sing Time

subtitles.original: どうしてもホームワークよりも重要課題
subtitles.english: No matter what, there's subjects more important than homework

subtitles.original: 放課後のお茶 おしゃべり 練習
subtitles.english: It's our after school tea, chatting and practice

subtitles.original: ユーモア ナチュラル めくるめく笑い
subtitles.english: I get so much humor, feeling natural and dazzling smiles

subtitles.original: ウケ過ぎてお腹痛い
subtitles.english: It makes my stomach hurt from laughing so much

subtitles.original: 呼吸ぴったし excellent!
subtitles.english: Our breathing was excellent!

subtitles.original: でも苦手なリフまだあったの
subtitles.english: But there were some riffs that weren't so good

subtitles.original: 特訓つきあってくれる?
subtitles.english: Will you give me some special training?

subtitles.original: も少し門限までだって帰りたくない
subtitles.english: It's just about my curfew, but I don't wanna go home

subtitles.original: never never... Can't Say Good-bye
subtitles.english: never never... Can't Say Good-bye

subtitles.original: めちゃめちゃ大好きっ!!
subtitles.english: I love you so much!!

subtitles.original: 超絶ぞっこんルララ Wonderful Show Time
subtitles.english: It's a totally awesome lu-la-la Wonderful Show Time

subtitles.original: 音楽って 音楽ってもう私達まんま
subtitles.english: Music is, music is already so us!

subtitles.original: スタンディングオベーション賞
subtitles.english: Standing Ovation Award

subtitles.original: オーディエンスなしでも奏でたい瞬間の real を
subtitles.english: Even without an audience, we wanna play this moment for real

subtitles.original: 昨日の後悔って 明日の心配って
subtitles.english: Yesterday's regrets, tomorrow's concerns

subtitles.original: ぶっちゃけぶっちゃけ誰得? 何得?
subtitles.english: Frankly, frankly, what good do they do? Who do they do good for?

subtitles.original: ラッキーはいつだってね "今" つかみもの
subtitles.english: I'm always so lucky, it's something I've grasped "now"

subtitles.original: 欲張れ乙女 与えられん、さらば
subtitles.english: Be desirous, fair maidens, if it's not given to you, say farewell

subtitles.original: どんな本も書いてない 授業じゃちょっと教わんないけど
subtitles.english: It's not written in any book or taught even a bit in class

subtitles.original: 一生忘れない
subtitles.english: But I'll never forget it for the rest of my life

subtitles.original: この世にないと思ってた奇跡
subtitles.english: A miracle I thought didn't exist in this world

subtitles.original: 一緒にね歌えば 信じられるんだ 強くなれるんだ
subtitles.english: If we sing together, we can believe in it, we can become stronger

subtitles.original: みんなが大好きっ!!
subtitles.english: Everyone's favorite...!!

subtitles.original: 延々続行ルララ Miracle Sing Time
subtitles.english: It's our never-ending lu-la-la Miracle Sing Time

subtitles.original: 歌って歌って愛伝える最強手段
subtitles.english: I'll sing, I'll sing, it's the absolute best way to express my love!

subtitles.original: つたない曲でも 微妙な歌詞でも届けたい
subtitles.english: Even if the composition is clumsy or the lyrics are iffy, I want to deliver...

subtitles.original: 精一杯の soul 等身大の life を
subtitles.english: I want to convey my soul with all I have, and my true-to-life self

subtitles.original: 今日は昨日みたい? 明日は今日みたい?
subtitles.english: Is today like yesterday? Will tomorrow be like today?

subtitles.original: 大丈夫大丈夫 楽しかったら大正解
subtitles.english: It's okay, it's okay! If we're having fun, it's the right answer!

subtitles.original: ロッカーはいつだってね "今" やんちゃ盛り
subtitles.english: Rocker is always in its prime 'now'

subtitles.original: 進め乙女 抱きしめて、希望を
subtitles.english: Go forth, girls! Embrace your hopes!

subtitles.original: 大好き 大好き 大好きをありがとう
subtitles.english: I love you, I love you, thank you for all the love

subtitles.original: 歌うよ 歌うよ 心こめて 今日も歌うよ
subtitles.english: I'll sing, I'll sing, with all my heart, I'll sing today too

subtitles.original: 大好き 大好き 大好きをありがとう
subtitles.english: I love you, I love you, thank you for all the love

subtitles.original: 歌うよ 歌うよ 愛をこめて ずっと歌うよ
subtitles.english: I'll sing, I'll sing, with all my love, I'll sing forever
